hooks.command: $j=$null; try{$j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json}catch{}; if($j -and $j.stop_hook_active){exit 0}; if(-not $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR){$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR='.'}; $c=git -C "$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain -- internal cmd; if(-not $c){exit 0}; $o=& powershell -NoProfile -File "$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\golc.ps1" test --quick --scope config-local 2>&1; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){[Console]::Error.WriteLine('GOLC quick-test gate: uncommitted changes under internal/ or cmd/ fail the pinned-toolchain quick tests. Fix or finish the in-flight work before stopping.' + "`n" + ($o|Out-String)); exit 2}; exit 0
